content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ edge_reject
P: widen_skew ∧ provider_only ∧ reg_test
V: valid_passes ∧ stale_still_401
A: patch_tolerance ∧ add_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and "401" and edge_reject.
Plan: widen_skew and provider_only and reg_test.
Verify: valid_passes and stale_still_401.
Answer target: patch_tolerance and add_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: overdue_middleware ∧ "402" ∧ charge_loop
P: overdue→"402" ∧ grace="24h" ∧ boundary_exclusive
V: no_loop ∧ grace24h_exact ∧ reg_test
A: patch_guard ∧ add_reg_test ∧ assert_boundary

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Constraints: overdue_middleware and "402" and charge_loop.
Plan: overdue then "402" and grace="24h" and boundary_exclusive.
Verify: no_loop and grace24h_exact and reg_test.
Answer target: patch_guard and add_reg_test and assert_boundary.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team=9 ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ traffic=steady ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec
P: modular_monolith ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ compliance_ready ∧ short_why
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ audit_ready
A: ship_monolith ∧ use_postgres ∧ isolate_compliance

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ async_queue ∧ short_why
V: fits_"6" ∧ meets_"9 weeks" ∧ uses_"PostgreSQL"
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
C: user_input_concat ∧ ".." ∧ "download" ∧ no_sanitization
P: validate_filename ∧ resolve_path ∧ enforce_base_dir
V: reject_traversal ∧ allowlist_check ∧ canonical_path_match
A: patch_handler ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Constraints: user_input_concat and ".." and "download" and no_sanitization.
Plan: validate_filename and resolve_path and enforce_base_dir.
Verify: reject_traversal and allowlist_check and canonical_path_match.
Answer target: patch_handler and add_tests and audit_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat
P: sqli_risk ∧ unvalidated_sort ∧ no_allowlist
V: parameterize ∧ allowlist_columns ∧ reject_unknown_sort
A: apply_allowlist ∧ add_tests ∧ verify_no_injection

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat.
Plan: sqli_risk and unvalidated_sort and no_allowlist.
Verify: parameterize and allowlist_columns and reject_unknown_sort.
Answer target: apply_allowlist and add_tests and verify_no_injection.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: anchors_present ∧ ordered_flow ∧ minimal_change
P: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: sequence_preserved ∧ db_err_to_"next(err)" ∧ no_extra_changes
A: async_await_conversion ∧ wrap_db_calls_try_catch ∧ forward_"next(err)"

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_forwards_"next(err)" ∧ async_await_applied
A: wrap_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_db→"next(err)" ∧ call_next
